chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 989 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.10.2025. Mr. Peeral Majeedano, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State alongwith IO / SIP Ahsanul Haq Gujjar PS Tando Ghulam Ali. = For reasons to be recorded, instant bail application is allowed and the applicant Khalid Hussain is granted post arrest bail in Crime No.142/2025 registered at P.S Tando Ghulam Ali for offence u/s 8 SPPMSS and Use of Gutka & Mainpuris Act, 2019, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE Tufail
